use_cases: AI chatbot prompt input with accessible tooltip and popover support
ChatGPT-style text input for AI-powered applications
Rich prompt composition interface with contextual help overlays
ai_summary: A ChatGPT-style prompt input component built with Radix UI primitives providing accessible tooltips, popovers, and dialog support. Features smooth fade and zoom animations for overlays, dark mode support, and a clean minimalist design. Designed for AI/chat interfaces where users compose prompts with contextual guidance.
